DECLARATION OF ALEXANDRIA C. CARRAHER IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CAL. CIV. CODE §2924K(A)(L) & (B) (TRANSACTION ID # 15106103) FILED BY PETITIONER FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEPOSITING SURPLUS PROCEEDS FROM THE SALE AND DISCHARGING PETITIONER IS GRANTED. PETITIONER'S APPLICATION FOR ATTORNEYS COSTS AND FEES PER CC 2924K(A)(1)&(B) IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 1,618.45 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. FUNDS SHALL BE DEPOSITED FORTHWITH AND TRUSTEE SHALL BE DISCHARGED. PETITIONER PREPARE ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT CONFORMS TO THE TENTATIVE APPROVED AS TO FORM OR IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK:N. WONG, NOT REPORTED, D501.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds
Off Calendar Dec-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

Notice Of Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds is GRANTED. Claimants shall receive $33,236.64 of the surplus funds deposited with the Court. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Rebbeca A Wiseman, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Depositing Surplus Proceeds From The Sale And Discharging Petitioner
Off Calendar May-26-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance by either party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY's Motion For Order Depositing Surplus Proceeds From The Sale And Discharging Petitioner is GRANTED. Petitioner's application for attorneys costs and fees per CC 2924k(a)(1)&(b) in the amount of $ 1,618.45 is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Funds shall be deposited forthwith and trustee shall be discharged. Petitioner prepare order. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative approved as to form or in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.
